data.title: Trump: Energy prices will fall, possibly even lower.
data.description: US President Trump stated that energy prices will fall, and may even go lower. Bessant will speak on measures to address rising energy prices, and the US has multiple options regarding Iran. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. Secretary of State Rubio: Trump's Mission Will Lead to a Safer World
data.description: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio has expressed confidence in President Donald Trump's leadership, stating that once Trump's mission is accomplished, the world will become a safer and better place. According to Jin10, Rubio emphasized the positive impact of Trump's policies on global security and prosperity. He highlighted the administration's efforts in strengthening international alliances and promoting peace through diplomatic channels. Rubio's remarks underscore the administration's commitment to achieving long-term global stability and enhancing international cooperation.

data.title: Kansas Fed Manufacturing Index Rises in March
data.description: The Kansas Federal Reserve's manufacturing composite index increased to 11 in March, up from a previous reading of 5. According to Jin10, this rise indicates an improvement in manufacturing activity within the region. The index measures the health of the manufacturing sector, with positive values suggesting expansion. This development may reflect broader economic trends and could influence future monetary policy decisions.

data.title: Clear Benefits from Increased Airport Wait Times
data.description: Record-breaking wait times at airports are causing frustration for travelers and disrupting vacation plans nationwide. Bloomberg posted on X, analysts have noted that this situation has proven advantageous for security firm Clear. The company, which provides expedited security screening services, is seeing increased demand as travelers seek to avoid long lines. This surge in demand highlights the growing reliance on services that offer convenience and efficiency in the face of travel disruptions.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump: 98% Reduction in Drug Trafficking via Sea Routes
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump announced a significant decrease in drug trafficking through sea routes, claiming a 98% reduction. According to Jin10, this statement highlights the administration's efforts to combat illegal drug trade and enhance border security. The President emphasized the importance of continued vigilance and cooperation with international partners to maintain this progress. The reduction is seen as a major achievement in the ongoing fight against drug smuggling, contributing to safer communities and improved public health outcomes.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump: Strait to Reopen if Iran Reaches Proper Agreement
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump stated that the strait will be reopened if Iran reaches a proper agreement. According to Jin10, this statement comes amid ongoing tensions in the region. The reopening of the strait is contingent upon Iran agreeing to terms that are deemed acceptable by the United States. This development is part of broader diplomatic efforts to address regional security concerns and ensure the safe passage of vessels through the strategic waterway. The situation remains fluid as negotiations continue.

data.title: Bitcoin Transfer from NYDIG Custody to Multiple Addresses
data.description: A significant transfer of Bitcoin has been reported. According to ChainCatcher, at 22:31, a total of 435.88 BTC was moved from NYDIG Custody to several addresses, including an anonymous one starting with 1CiRR2.

data.title: Trump: I thought the US stock market would fall even more; oil prices and the stock market have never fallen so "severely".
data.description: US President Trump, speaking about the US stock market, said he expected it to fall even more sharply. He stated that oil prices and the stock market had never fallen so "severely," and that the Iran issue would soon be resolved, not long after. (Jinshi)

data.title: Australia Prioritizes Real-World Asset Tokenization for Economic Growth
data.description: The Reserve Bank of Australia (RBA) has identified real-world asset tokenization as a strategic priority, following findings from Project Acacia. According to NS3.AI, the project revealed that tokenization could contribute 24 billion Australian dollars, or $16.7 billion, to the economy annually. Assistant Governor Brad Jones highlighted that the focus has shifted from questioning the importance of tokenization to exploring its implementation within Australia's financial system. The RBA plans to collaborate with government agencies and industry groups to develop a digital financial market infrastructure sandbox, which will encompass tokenized money, tokenized assets, and related infrastructure.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump: Destroying Iran's Drone Stockpile
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump announced that efforts are underway to dismantle Iran's drone inventory. According to Jin10, this move is part of a broader strategy to counter Iran's military capabilities. The U.S. administration has been focusing on reducing threats from Iran, which has been a point of contention in international relations. The destruction of these drones is seen as a significant step in curbing Iran's influence in the region. This development comes amid ongoing tensions between the two nations, with the U.S. aiming to maintain stability and security in the Middle East.

data.title: Trump: I'm not necessarily willing to reach a deal with Iran.
data.description: US President Trump stated, "I'm not necessarily willing to reach a deal with Iran. Iran should have reached an agreement four weeks ago; it was Iran begging for a deal, not me. Everyone knows it's Iran negotiating with us." (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump: Iranian Navy Has Been 'Sunk'
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump announced that the Iranian Navy has been 'sunk.' According to Jin10, this statement comes amid escalating tensions between the United States and Iran. The situation has raised concerns about potential military conflicts in the region, impacting global geopolitical stability. The U.S. administration has been closely monitoring Iran's military activities, and this latest development could have significant implications for international relations and security. The announcement follows a series of confrontations and diplomatic exchanges between the two nations, highlighting the ongoing challenges in achieving peaceful resolutions.

data.title: Iranian Military Source: Youths Volunteer for Basij and Revolutionary Guards, Tasnim Reports
data.description: According to Jin10, a report from Iran's Tasnim News Agency reveals that a significant number of Iranian youths have recently applied to join the Basij militia, the Revolutionary Guards, and military centers. This is in addition to the over one million ground combat personnel already organized in Iran. A military insider stated that the United States' potential 'suicidal' actions to force open the strait are anticipated. He added, 'We are prepared to allow them to execute their suicide strategy or to keep the strait closed.'

data.title: Housing Affordability in England Reaches Decade High Amid Wage Growth
data.description: Houses in England have become the most affordable in ten years, offering some relief to homebuyers. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that this change comes as strong wage growth aligns with a slow-moving property market. The combination of increased earnings and a stagnant housing market has improved the affordability landscape for potential buyers, marking a significant shift in the real estate sector.

data.title: OFFICIAL TRUMP Token Declines Amid Impeachment Odds
data.description: OFFICIAL TRUMP token experienced a decrease, trading at $3.115, marking a 5.15% drop for the day. According to NS3.AI, Kalshi has priced the odds of U.S. President Donald Trump's impeachment before January 1, 2028, at 69%. The article highlights concerns over weak exchange-flow follow-through and sustained realized losses, with the token breaking below $3.128, positioning it close to its all-time low of $2.705.

data.title: Saudi Wealth Fund Maintains Global Investment Strategy Amid Economic Concerns
data.description: Saudi Arabia's wealth fund, led by its top official, has reaffirmed its commitment to global investments despite increasing worries about the economic impact of ongoing conflicts. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the fund's strategy to continue its international investment activities. The official emphasized that the fund's approach remains unchanged, focusing on long-term growth and diversification across various sectors worldwide. This stance comes amid rising economic challenges linked to geopolitical tensions, which have raised concerns about potential financial repercussions. The wealth fund's strategy underscores its confidence in navigating the complex global economic landscape while pursuing opportunities for sustainable growth.

data.title: Germany and Australia Collaborate on Space Security Initiative
data.description: Germany and Australia are set to enhance space security by developing a joint network of sensors aimed at establishing a global early-warning system for potential satellite sabotage. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the collaboration's focus on safeguarding satellite infrastructure from threats. This initiative underscores the growing importance of international cooperation in addressing space-related security challenges.

data.title: Bitcoin Long-Term Holder Profitability Indicator Falls Below Key Threshold
data.description:
Bitcoin's long-term holder profitability indicator (LTH-SOPR) has recently fallen below the critical threshold of 1. According to ChainCatcher, this metric, analyzed by CryptoQuant analyst nino, specifically tracks the actual profit and loss status of investors holding Bitcoin for more than 155 days. A value above 1 indicates that holders are selling at a profit, while a value below 1 suggests that long-term holders are exiting at a loss.

The current drop below 1 signifies that an increasing number of seasoned holders are under pressure to sell at a loss. This situation may indicate that the market is approaching a 'capitulation' phase, where even the most patient long-term holders begin to react to price pressures. This phase is often considered an important signal in the process of finding a market bottom.

data.title: Iran’s Revolutionary Guards: Netanyahu Can Only Fight for Two More Weeks
data.description: Iran’s Revolutionary Guards have issued a statement claiming that Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu can only sustain military operations for another two weeks. According to Jin10, the statement reflects ongoing tensions in the region and highlights the challenges faced by Netanyahu's administration amid escalating conflicts. The Iranian military group has been vocal in its opposition to Israeli policies, and this latest assertion adds to the complex geopolitical dynamics in the Middle East. The situation remains fluid, with potential implications for regional stability and international relations.

data.title: Trust Wallet Introduces AI Agent Toolkit for Cross-Chain Transactions
data.description: Trust Wallet has unveiled a new AI agent toolkit designed to facilitate cryptocurrency transactions across over 25 blockchains. According to NS3.AI, this innovative toolkit enables users to perform cross-chain swaps on networks such as Solana and Bitcoin, while also managing recurring purchases. Users have the option to select an autonomous agent equipped with its own wallet or a mode that necessitates user approval for each transaction.
